summary: Completed Phase 3 frontend testing of ACE Labs (redesigned) and ACE Stacks (new page). All 20 required features verified working correctly.

ace_labs_page.hero_heading: PASS - 'ACE Labs: Internal R&D.' displays correctly
ace_labs_page.engine_core_visual: PASS - 3D glass sphere component visible with rotating internal light
ace_labs_page.scroll_spiral: PASS - ScrollSpiral component present with data-testid='scroll-spiral'
ace_labs_page.bento_grid_cards: PASS - 3 cards displayed (Velocity Agent, Flow-Bot, Friction-Scanner)
ace_labs_page.card_1_velocity_agent: PASS - ACE Velocity Agent with 'Internal Beta' status
ace_labs_page.card_2_flow_bot: PASS - ACE Flow-Bot with 'In Development' status
ace_labs_page.card_3_friction_scanner: PASS - ACE Friction-Scanner with 'R&D Phase' status
ace_labs_page.status_pills_border: PASS - Status pills have inline border style
ace_labs_page.glassmorphism_hover: PASS - Cards have 'labs-card-premium' class for hover effects

ace_stacks_page.hero_heading: PASS - 'ACE Stacks: Field Notes from the Frontline.' displays correctly
ace_stacks_page.article_grid: PASS - Two-column grid with 6 articles visible
ace_stacks_page.tech_stack_pills: PASS - Articles have tech stack pills (Next.js, Tailwind, Vercel, GPT-4, etc.)
ace_stacks_page.category_meta: PASS - Categories have // prefix format (// GROWTH ENGINEERING, etc.)
ace_stacks_page.sidebar_exists: PASS - Sidebar exists with 'The Tools that Power ACE' heading
ace_stacks_page.verified_tools: PASS - 7/7 tools present (Vercel, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, LangChain, Temporal, Grafana, Linear)
ace_stacks_page.affiliate_disclaimer: PASS - Affiliate disclaimer text present at bottom of sidebar
ace_stacks_page.article_card_class: PASS - Cards have 'stacks-article-card' class for hover effects
ace_stacks_page.article_title_class: PASS - Titles have 'stacks-article-title' class for violet gradient on hover

footer.ace_stacks_link: PASS - Footer Products column includes ACE Stacks link
footer.ace_labs_link: PASS - Footer Products column includes ACE Labs link

brand_name.correct_spelling: PASS - 'ACE inovations' (one n, lowercase i) used correctly
brand_name.no_incorrect_spelling: PASS - No 'ACE innovations' or 'ACE Inovations' found

existing_pages.squads_page: PASS - /squads route still works with ScrollSpiral

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features all working: ACE Labs redesigned with EngineCore hero, enhanced bento grid with status pills (Internal Beta, In Development, R&D Phase) and glassmorphism hover. ACE Stacks page complete with two-column article grid, tech stack pills, sidebar with 7 verified tools, and affiliate disclaimer. Navigation updated with ACE Labs, ACE Stacks, ACE Squads links. Footer updated with ACE Stacks. Brand name 'ACE inovations' (one n) correct throughout.
features_verified: ACE Labs page at /labs renders with Engine Core glass sphere hero visual
ACE Labs heading says 'ACE Labs: Internal R&D.'
ACE Labs has 3 bento grid cards: ACE Velocity Agent (Internal Beta), ACE Flow-Bot (In Development), ACE Friction-Scanner (R&D Phase)
Each Labs card has a status pill with border in the top right
Labs cards have glassmorphism hover effect (shadow lift) via labs-card-premium class
ACE Stacks page at /stacks renders correctly
ACE Stacks heading says 'ACE Stacks: Field Notes from the Frontline.'
Stacks page has two-column article grid with 6 articles
Each article card has tech stack pills (Next.js, Tailwind, Vercel, GPT-4, etc.)
Article cards have category meta with // prefix format
Sidebar exists with 'The Tools that Power ACE' heading
Sidebar has 7 verified tools (Vercel, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, LangChain, Temporal, Grafana, Linear)
Affiliate disclaimer text exists at the bottom of sidebar
Article cards have hover effect: shadow lift + title turns violet gradient (via CSS classes)
Navigation has ACE Labs, ACE Stacks, ACE Squads links that route correctly
ScrollSpiral component exists on all pages with data-testid='scroll-spiral'
Homepage at / still works correctly
ACE Squads page at /squads still works correctly
All brand names use 'ACE inovations' (one n, lowercase i)
Footer links include ACE Stacks
